title: Remediation Engine
subtitle: Detect and repair missing inherited data across one or all tenants.
check_modules_desc: Ensure each tenant has the base set of modules (CRM, Billing) configured.
check_admin_desc: Verify that each tenant has at least one active administrator with correct permissions.
check_societes_desc: Ensure each tenant has at least one active company record (societe).
check_quotas_desc: Confirm all quota fields are set (licenses, max companies, storage).
check_settings_desc: Ensure key-value settings exist for all tenants.
results_empty_subtitle: Select a scope and run the remediation to see results.
all_ok_subtitle: No missing inherited data found across the analyzed tenants.
